title: LGBTQ2+ Awareness Training - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > LGBTQ2+ Awareness Training 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MARIE EQUI CENTER LGBTQIA2S+ PEER SUPPORT DROP-IN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF LGBTQIA2S+ peer drop-in center provides resources, survival and harm reduction supplies, community connection, community health, and basic wound care. Offers peer support and case management to support community members in navigating systems of care, insurance systems, and direct connections to recovery and housing organizations. 4434 SE 25th Avenue Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Unhoused and low-income LGBTQIA2S+ community members Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-4pm. Closed Monday, May 4, 2026-Friday, May 8, 2026 for staff development. Email (503) 459-2584 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARIE EQUI CENTER LGBTQIA2S+ PEER SUPPORT DROP-IN
